c.d: The number of active users or downloads indicating the size of the community and content availability
Range of content types available for streaming, such as gaming, sports, TV shows, movies, social streams, or professional events
Ability to broadcast live streams simultaneously on multiple platforms
Whether the app supports mobile, desktop, browser-based, or multiple device access
Availability of free-tier streaming and what premium features or limitations exist
Live chat, audience engagement tools, guest collaboration, and customization during live streams
